Building
the
world’s
most
capable
AI
assistant.
Try Gemini
Made with Gemini Canvas
Video Generation
With Gemini Omni creating and editing videos is now as easy as having a conversation. Gemini Omni is like Nano Banana for videos. Blend text, images, and video to bring your ideas to life.
Learn more
The Latest UI
Neural Expressive has redesigned the app from the ground up. From typography to haptic feedback, visual responses, and vibrant colors, Neural Expressive is Gemini’s new functional design language built for the AI era.
Try it now
Coming soon
Your Personal Agent
Gemini spark is your personal AI Agent. Break down your biggest goals into manageable steps and connect your favorite apps to help you make real progress, faster.
Learn more
Daily Brief
Start your day with a personalized digest from Gemini. Your Daily Brief understands your rhythms and personal preferences to deliver your top priorities, organized by importance.
Learn more
Go Live With Gemini
Gemini Live is now built into your chat, so you can task switch seamlessly between talking and typing. As you talk, show Gemini what you’re seeing and try saying “reimagine this” to dream up creative new surroundings with Nano Banana.
Learn more
Find What’s Missing

Cancel anytime. No refunds for partial billing periods, except as required by applicable law. By subscribing, you agree to terms for

Google
, and
offers
. See how
Google handles data
. Google AI plans and Gemini for Gmail, Docs, and more are only available for ages 18+. Gemini for Gmail, Docs and more is available in
select languages
.
Rate limits may apply
.
1.
Google AI Plus, Pro, and Ultra plans are available in more than 140 countries and territories — see
full list of countries
. Certain AI benefits are only available for those aged 18+.
Learn more
.
2.
Usage access limits in the Gemini app: For the Gemini app, compute-based usage limits factor in the complexity of your prompt, the features you use, and the length of your chat. Your limit refreshes every 5 hours until you reach your weekly limit. You can extend your limits by purchasing AI credits. To learn more about usage access and how to use AI credits, please visit our
Help Center
.
3.
Google Flow features may vary by Google AI subscription tier, platform (web vs. mobile), and region. 18+. See
Google Flow Help Center
for more info.
4.
Gemini 3 Pro model, Nano Banana Pro, and Deep Search in AI Mode are available in select countries — see
full list of countries with Gemini 3 Pro in AI Mode
and
full list of countries with Nano Banana Pro in AI Mode
.
5.
Requires Google Home app, Wi-Fi, and internet connection. Features subject to change; available in select countries and languages. Gemini features work independently of Gemini apps. Check responses for accuracy; results may vary.
6.
The YouTube Premium Lite plan included in this bundle won’t activate if you already have an equivalent or YouTube Premium subscription.
Learn more
. Already have a YouTube membership?
Learn more about managing memberships
.
7.
Project Genie is available in more than 140 countries — see
full list of countries
. Only available with a Google AI Ultra plan.
8.
YouTube Premium individual plan is available in over 40 countries — see
full list of countries
.
9.
Jules is an asynchronous coding agent that is currently in beta. To use Jules, you must be 18 years old or older. Only English is officially supported at this time. Capacity is subject to availability and not guaranteed.
